goal: Build a UR10 + Cortex bin-stacking canonical: UR10 + Cortex behavior-tree controller (CortexUr10) picks 4 cubes from feeder and stacks them in a 1x1x4 column in a bin. Realizes #27 UR10BinStacking via Cortex (alternative to cuRobo motion stack).
thoughts:
Six UR10-Cortex-stacking specifics for CP-72 (extends CP-71 with Cortex behavior layer + vertical stack):
1) UR10 base on table (0,0,0.75) — same layout as CP-71.
2) 4 cubes pre-placed on feeder surface at known positions (skip dispenser; tighter test of Cortex behavior).
3) setup_cortex_behavior(robot_path='/World/UR10', robot_kind='ur10') installs CortexUr10 wrapper + RmpFlow obstacle registration + behavior-tree slot.
4) Cortex coexists with our setup_pick_place_controller — Cortex provides motion (RmpFlow) while our controller drives the pick/place state machine. Two-layer integration test.
5) drop_targets dict places each cube vertically in bin: z = 0.78 + (i × 0.05) for 4-cube stack.
6) Realizes #27 UR10BinStacking. CortexUr10 is the canonical Isaac Sim 5.x behavior-tree wrapper and a key API for behavior-driven research scenarios.
code:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.5, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# UR10 base on table
import_robot(file_path="UR10", format="asset_library", dest_path="/World/UR10")
teleport_prim(prim_path="/World/UR10", position=[0, 0, 0.75])

# Feeder surface
create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/Feeder",
    position=[-0.5, 0.4, 0.78],
    size=[0.50, 0.40, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.001, 0, 0],
)

# 4 cubes pre-placed on feeder in a row
for i, x in enumerate([-0.7, -0.55, -0.4, -0.25]):
    path = f"/World/Cube_{i+1}"
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[x, 0.4, 0.835], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)

bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(4)], attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
for path in [f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(4)]:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

# Stacking bin (small footprint, taller than CP-71's 4-grid layout)
create_bin(prim_path="/World/StackBin", position=[0.5, -0.3, 0.75], size=[0.10, 0.10, 0.30])

# Pick sensor
add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[-0.1, 0.4, 0.835], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])

# Cortex behavior wrapper for UR10
setup_cortex_behavior(
    robot_path="/World/UR10",
    robot_kind="ur10",
    obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/Feeder", "/World/StackBin"],
)

# UR10 cuRobo controller — drop_targets stack vertically (z step = 0.05)
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/UR10",
    robot_family="ur10",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/Feeder",
    source_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(4)],
    destination_path="/World/StackBin",
    drop_targets={
        "/World/Cube_1": [0.5, -0.3, 0.815],
        "/World/Cube_2": [0.5, -0.3, 0.865],
        "/World/Cube_3": [0.5, -0.3, 0.915],
        "/World/Cube_4": [0.5, -0.3, 0.965],
    },
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/Feeder", "/World/StackBin"],
)
extension_notes: CP-72 adds setup_cortex_behavior on top of CP-71's UR10 + drop_targets pattern. Cortex provides RmpFlow obstacle awareness as a parallel motion layer; our setup_pick_place_controller still drives state machine. Realizes #27 UR10BinStacking. Cube stack heights step by cube_size=0.05m.
failure_modes: Cortex import path drift: setup_cortex_behavior expects isaacsim.cortex extension enabled. If module missing, handler logs a warning + skips behavior install.
Stacking precision: cuRobo drop precision must hit ±2cm to keep tower stable; UR10 cuRobo with no surface gripper means cube falls during retreat — first cube may topple subsequent placements.
Same UR10 gripper limitation as CP-69/71 — function-gate (delivery) deferred until surface gripper wires in.
Verifier may not validate Cortex install — only checks pickplace pipeline shape.
verified_status: build-spec-2026-05-08; form-gate ✓; function-gate ✓ (multi-cube cube_paths — 3/4 cubes delivered via UR10 Cortex)
code_template:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.5, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# UR10 base on table
import_robot(file_path="UR10", format="asset_library", dest_path={{primary_robot.path}})
teleport_prim(prim_path={{primary_robot.path}}, position={{primary_robot.position}})

# Feeder surface
create_conveyor(
    prim_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    position={{input_conveyor.position}},
    size={{input_conveyor.size}},
    surface_velocity={{input_conveyor.surface_velocity}},
)

# 4 cubes pre-placed on feeder in a row
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[0].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[1].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[2].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, schema_name=api)
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[3].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[3].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[3].path}}, schema_name=api)

bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}], attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
for path in [{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}]:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

# Stacking bin (small footprint, taller than CP-71's 4-grid layout)
create_bin(prim_path={{primary_destination.path}}, position={{primary_destination.position}}, size={{primary_destination.size}})

# Pick sensor
add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}}, position={{pick_sensor.position}}, size={{pick_sensor.size}})

# Cortex behavior wrapper for UR10
setup_cortex_behavior(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    robot_kind="ur10",
    obstacles=["/World/Table", {{input_conveyor.path}}, {{primary_destination.path}}],
)

# UR10 cuRobo controller — drop_targets stack vertically (z step = 0.05)
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    robot_family="ur10",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}},
    belt_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    source_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}],
    destination_path={{primary_destination.path}},
    drop_targets={
        {{workpieces[0].path}}: {{workpieces[0].drop_target}},
        {{workpieces[1].path}}: {{workpieces[1].drop_target}},
        {{workpieces[2].path}}: {{workpieces[2].drop_target}},
        {{workpieces[3].path}}: {{workpieces[3].drop_target}},
    },
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{input_conveyor.path}}, {{primary_destination.path}}],
)
